prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PRF-PFDECPS-2PC-STD-BL-2 Product Type: ABIS_BOOK Brand (from catalog): Productive Fitness Existing Title: Productive Fitness Dumbbell Exercises Chart Poster 2pc Set Description: This Dumbbell Training Workout Set of posters is a great addition to any home gym or fitness facility. Make your strength training routine simple. Just follow one of the 5 given routines for 4-6 weeks and then move on to the next. Cycle through them to keep your workouts fresh. The set includes two laminated, 24 x 36 inch posters.

Dumbbell Exercises: Workout Chart 1
- 16 different dumbbell exercises - Anterior and Posterior Muscle diagrams that show most of the major muscles in your body. - Quickly reference the muscles you are working for any given exercise. - A full Anterior diagram gives a better visual reference when locating muscle groups.

Dumbbell Exercises: Workout Chart 2
- 16 different dumbbell exercises - Step-by-step instructions on how to stabilize your torso (critical for safe and effective exercise) - Three 1 day full body exercise routines that are simple to follow. - Two 2 day split routine programs that amp up your workouts by spending a little more time on specific areas. These laminated, big, beautifully colored posters are organized to make working out quick and easy. Search Terms: home gym exercise home workout exercise basics Features: - Laminated === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
